title: Policy: Policies Applied - Restart the app
scenario: Verify that policies applied to a device remain locked after restarting the app, and that changes made to the policy while the app is off are properly applied when the app is started again.
steps: Apply a policy to a device.
Verify that the policy remains locked/applied on the device.
While the app is off, modify the policy (e.g., change settings or rules).
Verify that the modified policy is properly applied to the device.
expected: Policies applied to a device remain locked after restarting the app, and any changes made to the policy while the app was off are properly applied when the app is started again.
